title: dendrobium obliquum
intro: Dendrobium obliquum, also known as the "Dendrobium Orchid," is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dendrobium obliquum include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Dendrobium obliquum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
